review_count.reviewContent: These guacamole is really tasty. My daughter gave me a packet to try and I really like it. Dipped with nachos… yummy.

Impressed with huge avocado chunks in this guac dip—1st ingredient on list. Obviously isn’t as sinfully tasty as commercially available dips loaded with preservatives but can’t get any fresher than this guac dip. Snacking can’t get any healthier
📦Packaging: well 😋Taste: repeat so many times, fresh and little spicy. Recommend to add lemon juice.

13710063832.title: DH Food Vietnamese Salt and Sauce for salad dressing dipping sauce
13710063832.detail_text: Bring authentic Vietnamese flavor to your meals with this curated sauce collection from DH Foods. Featuring a range of signature dipping sauces and seasonings, this selection captures the bold, fresh, and balanced taste profiles commonly found across Vietnam. Each sauce is crafted to complement a variety of dishes, especially street food favorites and home-style meals. Variants Tay Ninh Shrimp Salt A savory and flavorful seasoning inspired by Tay Ninh’s well-known shrimp salt, ideal for enhancing fruits, snacks, and light dishes. Nha Trang Lime Green Chili Sauce A zesty and spicy sauce combining lime and green chili flavors, commonly paired with seafood and grilled dishes. Kumquat Sauce A citrus-forward dipping sauce with a refreshing tang, suitable for adding brightness to meats and appetizers. Original Peanut Rice Paper Roll Dipping Sauce A rich and nutty sauce traditionally served with Vietnamese rice paper rolls, delivering a smooth and satisfying flavor. Key Features Authentic Vietnamese-style sauces Suitable for dipping, seasoning, and enhancing meals Versatile pairings with seafood, snacks, and traditional dishes Convenient for home cooking and ready-to-serve use Suggested Uses Pair with rice paper rolls and fresh spring rolls Use as dipping sauce for seafood and grilled items Enhance snacks, fruits, and light bites Add flavor to everyday meals

301130921.detail_text: Highlights RedMart Deli Jalapeno Dip is a creamy, spicy, and flavorful appetizer that brings a perfect kick to any snack table.
